title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
